metadata.title: CompTIA Security+ SY0-701 practice questions extracted from user-provided transcript
metadata.extraction_method: Parsed user-provided Tactiq transcript by Correct answer markers, kept question stems, extracted stated correct answers, and normalized/balanced four-option choices for local study use.

schema.correct_answers: Array containing the correct choice ID.
schema.extracted_correct_answer: The transcript's stated correct answer after normalization.
schema.original_options_text: Raw transcript text after the question mark before normalization.
